_comment: DynamoDB CBDCCollection table. PK = cbdccollectioncountry, SK = cbdccollectionlegalentityid. Validation checks country + legalentityid + destination. Deploy with: aws dynamodb create-table --cli-input-json file://client_registry_table.json

_sample_items._comment: Apex Pension Fund LLC — US domiciled, account GB-CUST-00421
Meridian Asset Management — US domiciled, account GB-CUST-00532
Summit Endowment Fund — US domiciled, account GB-CUST-00615

_seed_commands: aws dynamodb put-item --table-name CBDCCollection --item '{"cbdccollectioncountry":{"S":"US"},"cbdccollectionlegalentityid":{"S":"GB-CUST-00421"},"allowed_formats":{"SS":["PDF","XLSX","CSV"]},"source":{"S":"S3"},"destination":{"S":"Snowflake"},"active_flag":{"BOOL":true},"client_name":{"S":"Apex Pension Fund LLC"}}'

aws dynamodb put-item --table-name CBDCCollection --item '{"cbdccollectioncountry":{"S":"US"},"cbdccollectionlegalentityid":{"S":"GB-CUST-00532"},"allowed_formats":{"SS":["PDF","XLSX","CSV"]},"source":{"S":"S3"},"destination":{"S":"Snowflake"},"active_flag":{"BOOL":true},"client_name":{"S":"Meridian Asset Management"}}'

aws dynamodb put-item --table-name CBDCCollection --item '{"cbdccollectioncountry":{"S":"US"},"cbdccollectionlegalentityid":{"S":"GB-CUST-00615"},"allowed_formats":{"SS":["PDF","XLSX","CSV"]},"source":{"S":"S3"},"destination":{"S":"Snowflake"},"active_flag":{"BOOL":true},"client_name":{"S":"Summit Endowment Fund"}}'
